data.label: Dashboard Creator Agent
data.goal: Create a Databricks AI/BI (Lakeview) dashboard from the visual-to-UCMV mappings.
data.backstory: You are a Databricks analytics engineer who deploys Lakeview dashboards. Use the Databricks Dashboard Creator tool to build a complete dashboard with correct widget types (bar, line, table, counter) from the visual mappings generated in the previous flow step. Call the tool with ZERO arguments — all mapping data is auto-injected from the flow.

data.label: Create Databricks Dashboard
data.description:
Create a Databricks AI/BI (Lakeview) dashboard from visual-to-UCMV mappings using the Databricks Dashboard Creator tool.

⚠️ CRITICAL: Call the Databricks Dashboard Creator tool with ZERO arguments.
The visual_mappings_json is auto-injected from the PBI Visual-UCMV Mapper crew (previous flow step).

Before running, configure the tool config with:
- warehouse_id: SQL warehouse ID for dashboard queries
- dashboard_title: Display name for the dashboard
- parent_path: Workspace folder path (default: /Workspace/Shared)
- publish_dashboard: Whether to publish after creation (default: true)
- catalog, schema_name: UC location context (optional, from flow injection)

The tool will:
1. Parse the visual mappings (from flow injection)
2. Build Lakeview dashboard JSON with pages/widgets/datasets
3. Map visual types to widget types (barChart→bar, lineChart→line, tableEx→table, card→counter)
4. Call the Databricks Lakeview REST API to create/update the dashboard
5. Optionally publish the dashboard

Return the dashboard URL and creation status.
data.expected_output:
JSON object with dashboard creation result:
- dashboard_id: Databricks dashboard ID
- dashboard_url: Full URL to access the dashboard
- display_name: Dashboard title
- status: 'created' or 'updated'
- published: whether the dashboard was published
- widget_count, page_count, dataset_count: dashboard metrics

Return the complete JSON including the dashboard URL.
